summary: Frontend-only Playwright e2e testing of Evman (event registration) mock-app. All 12 pages and specified flows verified. 100% of critical UI flows pass. Only minor non-blocking observations (ReactQuill findDOMNode deprecation warning, no ESC key handler on Modal, SaveIndicator idle-state cosmetic).

issues: SaveIndicator shows 'Сохранено' chip even in idle state before any change (SaveIndicator returns chip-brand for both 'idle' and 'saved'). Cosmetic — consider hiding chip until first save.
Modal does not close on ESC keypress; users must click ✕ or overlay. Minor UX.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Hide FormEdit SaveIndicator in true idle state (before user has typed anything) so it doesn't misleadingly show 'Сохранено'.
OPTIONAL: Add ESC-key handler to Modal component.
OPTIONAL: Upgrade react-quill (or switch to react-quill-new) — current version emits React 18 findDOMNode deprecation warning in console.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx useEventContext calls api.getEvent() on every location change — could cause header flicker when navigating between pages of the same event. Consider caching or reading eventId only.
PublicForm.jsx: on submit error, navigates to /fail — but the mock rarely errors. OK.
MailCompose.jsx: When template is selected, subject/body Quill inputs are hidden entirely. Send button will use the template values (correct per api.sendMail). OK.

store.js: When localStorage has stale seed data from previous versions, load() will happily return it. There's no schema version check. Since KEY is 'v1', bumping the seed shape would require a manual clear.
test_credentials: admin@evman.io / admin1234 (superuser) & manager@evman.io / manager1234 — both work; no /app/memory/test_credentials.md file exists but credentials matched review request.
seed_data_creation: Reset localStorage under key 'evman.mock.v1' at start of tests to guarantee a clean seed. Seed automatically creates one event ('Чистый тест для разработчиков') and one template ('Приветственное письмо').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is a pure localStorage mock; there is NO real backend involved. All API calls in mock/api.js are async with ~220ms simulated latency, so tests must wait_for_selector rather than reading DOM immediately after navigation. Seed event ID is random per-clear ('ev_' + uid). To test header event name, wait for its text to update via wait_for_function (initial render shows '— выберите —'). Modal component has no ESC handler — close via [data-testid='...-close'] or overlay click. Delete Confirm button only enables when input exactly matches event name. Superuser (u_admin) remove buttons in Managers/Admins pages are disabled by design. Template selection in MailCompose replaces the entire subject+body Quill area with a preview panel (no [data-testid='mail-subject'] present when template is chosen). PublicForm requires ev.registration_open=true; toggling it off in EventSettings will render the 'closed' description instead.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Two initial test failures were caused by test-side timing/selector issues (not app bugs): (1) header event name was read before async api.getEvent() resolved; fixed by wait_for_function. (2) Form fields checked before async api.getForm() resolved; fixed with wait_for_selector. After remediation of test script, all specified flows pass.
